gameIdentity.tagline: Come in, Spinner — if ye dare.

iconConcept.description: A single gold doubloon tilted at 15 degrees, skull-side facing forward. The skull wears a tarnished iron crown. Rim serrations catch torch-light. Background: black with radial amber glow. Dimensions: 512×512px. Export formats: PNG @1x/2x/3x, SVG for web.

treasure-gold.usage: Coin faces, win banners, title highlights, CTA borders

doubloon-amber.usage: Coin rim gradient, torch halos, secondary accents

dark-oak.usage: Kip plank, panel backgrounds, footer bar

sea-shadow.usage: Page background, cavern deep-shadow, vignette overlay

torch-orange.usage: Torch flame, hot-state button fill, OddingOut flicker

fog-white.usage: Body text, parchment textures, result label backgrounds

blood-red.usage: Loss state banners, OddsTracker danger indicator, Barred call

kelp-green.usage: Win state border glow, Ringie confirm badge, bet confirmed chip

headsCoins.label: HEADS
headsCoins.svgPathDescription: Central skull (width 54px, height 60px): cranium as rounded-top oval path with flat base; two hollow ovoid eye sockets at 30% / 70% x-axis; nasal cavity as inverted heart; eight upper teeth rectangles in jaw arc. Crown: five-pointed iron crown sitting atop cranium, each point tipped with a tiny doubloon circle (r=4px). Decorative cross-hatching along skull cheekbones using 2px stroke lines at 45deg. All fills use --fog-white (#F5ECD7) on main skull shapes, --dark-oak (#2C1A0E) for eye and nose voids.

mottoRibbon.position: arced ribbon below skull, curve radius 52px

tailsCoin.label: TAILS
tailsCoin.svgPathDescription: Two crossed cutlasses (blade length 60px, hilt 18px) forming an X centred on the coin face. Each blade: tapered quadrilateral path, wider at guard (8px) narrowing to 2px tip; guard is a straight crosspiece (20px wide, 4px thick); grip is wrapped with a diagonal hatching pattern. Below the X-intersection sits an anchor (total height 40px): ring at top (r=8px), vertical shank (3px wide, 22px tall), flukes curving outward at base (wingspan 30px). Cutlass fills: --doubloon-amber (#C8860A) for blade, --dark-oak (#2C1A0E) for hilt. Anchor fill: --sea-shadow (#0D1B2A) with --treasure-gold (#FFD700) 1px stroke.

mottoRibbon.position: arced ribbon below anchor, curve radius 52px

baseLayer.texture: CSS noise overlay using SVG feTurbulence (baseFrequency 0.65, numOctaves 3, opacity 0.08) simulating damp stone
baseLayer.vignette: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 50%, transparent 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 100%) — fixed overlay layer z-index 1

midLayer.cavern_walls: Left and right edges: irregular dark-stone silhouette SVG paths in --dark-oak (#2C1A0E), top-edge stalactite row (8–12 irregular drips)
midLayer.floor: Sandy cavern floor occupying bottom 28% of viewport, colour: linear-gradient(180deg, #4A3520 0%, #2C1A0E 100%)

torchLeft.description: Wall-mounted iron bracket torch. Bracket: --dark-oak SVG rect. Flame: 3-layer CSS keyframe flicker (see animation section). Halo: radial-gradient in --torch-orange (#FF6B2B) at 40% opacity, radius 120px

torchRight.description: Mirror of torchLeft — flicker animation offset by 340ms for visual independence

sandRing.description: Elliptical sand ring drawn in CSS: border 6px dashed --doubloon-amber (#C8860A) at 60% opacity on an ellipse. Interior fill: rgba(74, 53, 32, 0.3). Subtle 'RING' text stencilled at bottom arc in --fog-white at 20% opacity, font-size 11px, Pirata One.

kip.description: Driftwood plank SVG: irregular rectangular path with slight curve along top edge, wood-grain lines (6–8 horizontal strokes in slightly varied brown tones), worn corners. Fill: linear-gradient(95deg, #5A3A1A, #2C1A0E, #5A3A1A). Coins rest on top-center of kip before launch.

treasureChestTopLeft.description: Partially open chest, lid ajar 20deg. Closed-lid state by default; lid opens to 60deg on win events > 5× bet. Fill: --dark-oak body, --doubloon-amber metal bands and lock hasp. Gold coin glow emanates from interior when open.

treasureChestTopRight.description: Closed chest, identical construction to left. Lid flips open on jackpot / OddingOut animations.

goldDust.description: Floating gold motes drifting upward from sand ring. Each particle: 2–4px circle, fill #FFD700, opacity oscillates 0.2→0.8. Random x-drift ±30px per cycle. Lifetime: 3000–5000ms. Respawn at ring-floor level continuously.
goldDust.spawnArea: ellipse centered at 50% x, 65% y, radii 180px × 40px

torchSpark.description: Hot sparks ejected from each torch flame. Each spark: 1–3px circle, fill --torch-orange (#FF6B2B), short lifespan 400–800ms. Trajectory: parabolic arc upward and outward 20–50px before fading to opacity 0.

pirateCaptain.role: Boxer — manages bets, calls the action
pirateCaptain.position: Left edge of SpinArena, x: 14%, y: 30–85%, height: 55vh
pirateCaptain.appearance: Tall one-eyed pirate captain. Tricorn hat with skull pin. Weathered naval coat in --dark-oak. Leather eye-patch over left eye. Hook hand (right). Sash of --blood-red. Boots with buckles.

expressionStates.neutral: Arms crossed, single eye half-lidded, faint smirk. Default idle state. Subtle breathing cycle: scale(1) → scale(1.005) at 3s interval.
expressionStates.excited: Both arms raised (hook glinting), eye wide, mouth open in grin. Triggered on WIN result.
expressionStates.angry: Hook pointed at camera, eye narrowed to slit, furrowed brow. Triggered on ODDED_OUT / BARRED result.
expressionStates.pleased: Thumbs-up with good hand, eye closed in satisfied wink, subtle nod animation. Triggered on HEADS win streak ≥3.

idleAnimations: breathing-sway: translateX(0) → translateX(3px) over 4s ease-in-out infinite alternate
hat-tilt: rotate(0deg) → rotate(1deg) over 6s ease-in-out infinite alternate

parrot.position: Top-right corner of viewport, x: 91%, y: 8%
parrot.appearance: Scarlet macaw with --treasure-gold wing tips. Perched on a wooden post stub. Swings on perch during idle.

animationStates.idle: perch-swing: rotate(-8deg) → rotate(8deg) over 1.8s ease-in-out infinite alternate
animationStates.react_win: Wing-flap 3× rapid, squawk beak open/close 2×. Duration: 1200ms.
animationStates.react_loss: Hides face under wing. Duration: 800ms hold.
animationStates.react_odds: Head tilts 45deg left, question-mark emoji floats above. Duration: 600ms.
animationStates.react_odded: Falls off perch (translateY +120px), flies back up. Duration: 1800ms.

ringie.position: Bottom-center of SpinArena, below sandRing, x: 50%, y: 88%
ringie.artStyle: Minimal silhouette — a hunched old sailor in a pea coat, gesture-driven
ringie.appearance: Short figure, battered sailor's cap, pointing arm used for result calls

callAnimations.comeInSpinner: Arm sweeps inward in beckoning arc. Text banner rises: 'COME IN, SPINNER!' Duration: 800ms.
callAnimations.headsCall: Both arms shoot skyward. Gold particle burst from hands. Duration: 600ms.
callAnimations.tailsCall: Arms cross downward. Deep red ripple radiates outward. Duration: 600ms.
callAnimations.oddsCall: Single arm horizontal with palm flat. Amber pulse rings outward. Duration: 500ms.
callAnimations.barredCall: Arms crossed above head in X. Red flash overlay. Duration: 400ms.

primary.usage: Game title, section headers, result banners, button labels, coin face labels

body.usage: Game instructions, bet amounts, log history, parrot dialogue, odds counter

specialStyles.wantedPosterHeader: font-family: 'Pirata One'; font-size: 1.6rem; color: #2C1A0E; text-shadow: none; background: #F5ECD7; border: 4px double #2C1A0E; padding: 4px 12px;
specialStyles.dialogueBubble: font-family: 'IM Fell English', serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 13px; background: rgba(245,236,215,0.92); color: #2C1A0E; border: 1px solid #C8860A; border-radius: 8px 8px 8px 0; padding: 6px 10px;

components: StakeInput (GC or SC amount, no $ prefix)

mobile.pirateCapitan: hidden on viewports < 600px to preserve space
mobile.parrot: scaled to 60%, repositioned to top-right of spinArena

currencyDisplay.rule: No $ prefix on any displayed amounts

goldCoins.placement: suffix after value with single space

sweepsCoins.placement: suffix after value with single space

socialModeToggle.description: Toggle switch in header allowing player to switch between GC (Gold Coins) and SC (Sweeps Coins) modes without page reload
socialModeToggle.implementation: CSS sliding toggle with state managed via JS class on <body> element — body.gc-mode / body.sc-mode
socialModeToggle.togglePosition: top-right of titleHeader, right: 20px, vertically centered

stakeUsCompliance.helpTextRequired: Sweepstakes rules must be accessible via ? icon in header. Links to official Stake.US terms.
stakeUsCompliance.auditTrail: All rounds must be loggable with seed, result, and bet amounts for Provably Fair verification.

soundDesign.note: Reference from docs/2up.md — Sound Design section
soundDesign.implementation: Web Audio API preferred; fallback to <audio preload='auto'> for mobile Safari compatibility

treasureChestOpener.animation: Chest lid flies open (rotateX -90deg over 400ms), gold coins burst upward (40 particles), ambient glow expands to 200px radius

wantedPosterLeaderboard.style: Parchment-coloured panel with 'WANTED' header in Pirata One, list of top 10 wins in IM Fell English italic
wantedPosterLeaderboard.position: Accessible via trophy icon button in titleHeader

bobbingShip.description: CSS-animated dark ship silhouette behind cavern mouth, bottom 10% of background

deliverables.nextStep: Hand off to UI Developer for implementation against frontend/src/ using this spec as single source of truth
